introSection: Looping Coaster  was a steel roller coaster located at Funtown Pier located in Seaside Park, New Jersey, USA. It opened on August 23, 1989. The attraction was destroyed on October 29, 2012, when Hurricane Sandy washed away the pier.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride follows a standard layout, similar to early looping Pinfari Zyklon models. When the ride first opened, the track was golden-brown and the supports were silver. Sometime in 2007, the track was repainted red.

fullText:
Looping Coaster  was a steel roller coaster located at Funtown Pier located in Seaside Park, New Jersey, USA. It opened on August 23, 1989. The attraction was destroyed on October 29, 2012, when Hurricane Sandy washed away the pier.

The ride follows a standard layout, similar to early looping Pinfari Zyklon models. When the ride first opened, the track was golden-brown and the supports were silver. Sometime in 2007, the track was repainted red.
